name: chorus-copilot
description: Bridge Chorus AI-DLC platform to GitHub Copilot Chat via MCP

chatParticipants.name: chorus
chatParticipants.description: Interact with Chorus project management — checkin, tasks, proposals, and more

languageModelTools.name: chorus_checkin
languageModelTools.description: Check in to Chorus — returns agent identity, project tracker, and unread notifications
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check in to the Chorus AI-DLC platform. Call this first to get agent identity, assigned projects, and unread notifications. No parameters needed.

languageModelTools.name: chorus_list_tasks
languageModelTools.description: List tasks in a Chorus project
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List tasks in a Chorus project. Use projectUuid from checkin result. Optional filters: status (open/assigned/in_progress/to_verify/done/closed), priority (low/medium/high/critical).

languageModelTools.name: chorus_get_available_tasks
languageModelTools.description: Get claimable tasks (status=open) in a project
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get tasks that are available to claim (open status) in a Chorus project.

languageModelTools.name: chorus_claim_task
languageModelTools.description: Claim an open task (changes status to assigned)
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Claim an open task, assigning it to the current agent. The task must be in 'open' status.

languageModelTools.name: chorus_report_work
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Report work progress on a claimed task. Adds a progress comment and optionally updates task status.

languageModelTools.name: chorus_submit_for_verify
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Submit a task for verification/review. Changes status from in_progress to to_verify.
